overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city district at dusk, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and elevated walkways. The character navigates through a commercial plaza with large digital billboards before ascending stairs to an upper level.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following pedestrians through a neon-lit cyberpunk commercial street. A large holographic tree with glowing pink blossoms stands on the right, while illuminated billboards line the left side. The camera follows a character with red hair who eventually steps aside.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and tilts up to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards, including a distinctive checkered pattern display and a CIRRU advertisement. The scene opens into a wide plaza with an outdoor restaurant featuring yellow umbrellas, while the holographic tree recedes into the distance.

turning toward stairway entrance and beginning ascent

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the CIRRU billboard and restaurant area, approaching a concrete stairway leading upward. A pedestrian in red pants crosses the path, and a large digital billboard featuring a purple-haired character becomes visible on the left as the camera turns toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass planters

reaching top of stairs and entering elevated plaza area

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the concrete stairs, passing a glass planter with neon trim on the right. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into an elevated plaza with reflective flooring, while the previous street-level billboards and holographic tree disappear from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial street that gradually ascends into an elevated futuristic plaza. It begins by following pedestrians past a glowing pink holographic tree and illuminated billboards, trailing a red-haired character who eventually steps out of frame. As the camera turns left and tilts upward, the view expands to reveal towering skyscrapers adorned with massive digital displays and a plaza featuring an outdoor restaurant with yellow umbrellas. The scene then shifts past a CIRRU advertisement and a pedestrian in red pants, turning toward a concrete stairway flanked by a large billboard of a purple-haired character. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs past a neon-trimmed glass planter, emerging onto a reflective upper plaza as the street-level lights and holographic tree vanish from view.
